# opnsense_quagga_ospf_neighbor (Data Source)

Reads an OSPF neighbor on OPNsense by its UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `address` (String) Neighbor IP address.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this neighbor is enabled.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Poll interval in seconds (0 = default).
- `priority` (Number) Neighbor priority (0 = default).
